title: Jim x Thi Knowledge Portal
scopeNote: Public-facing GitHub Pages portal for Jim and Thi. It starts nearly blank, with TinyFish content and generic topic pills that can absorb future summaries, calls, and assets.

edgeTypeLegend.HOSTS_PILL: Portal contains a navigation pill / topic cluster
edgeTypeLegend.HAS_ARTIFACT: Pill contains a published or planned artifact
edgeTypeLegend.HAS_SOURCE_STREAM: Pill can ingest a source stream such as chat, call, file, or asset
edgeTypeLegend.RELATES_TO: Pill or artifact has a conceptual relationship to another node
edgeTypeLegend.NEXT_ACTION: Node has a recommended next action
edgeTypeLegend.USES_ASSET_FOLDER: Node uses the shared Drive asset folder
edgeTypeLegend.GOVERNS: A protocol governs the portal workflow

nodes.name: Jim x Thi Portal
nodes.summary: Public GitHub Pages cockpit for shared summaries, artifacts, and topic clusters.
nodes.detail: The portal is intentionally sparse at launch: it should grow from actual Jim/Thi work instead of pretending to be full.

nodes.name: Parallel Graph Protocol
nodes.summary: Every meaningful portal update also updates browser graph data and the Neo4j universe.
nodes.detail: The graph is generated from structured JSON and pushed through an idempotent Cypher path.

nodes.name: Shared Drive Assets
nodes.summary: Google Drive drop zone for files, screenshots, transcripts, and visual assets.
nodes.detail: Created under openmolthi@gmail.com and shared by link for editing.

nodes.name: Group Chat
nodes.summary: WhatsApp exchanges that can be distilled into portal items.
nodes.detail: Good for requests, corrections, hypotheses, and lightweight decisions.

nodes.name: Video Calls
nodes.summary: Call notes or transcripts that can become summary artifacts.
nodes.detail: Future call summaries should preserve date, participants, claims, decisions, and follow-ups.

nodes.name: TinyFish
nodes.summary: The only seeded content cluster at launch.
nodes.detail: Contains the existing founder demo and evidence carousel so Jim has something real to inspect immediately.

nodes.name: Language
nodes.summary: Placeholder for language, phrasing, naming, rhetoric, and semantic work.
nodes.detail: Use this when a conversation turns into wording, concepts, or distinctions.

nodes.name: Books
nodes.summary: Books, essays, reading notes, and literary source material.
nodes.detail: Now seeded with The Corporate, Thi's modern Machiavelli frame for organizational dysfunction as human power, fear, incentives, culture, and trust.

nodes.name: Headlines
nodes.summary: Placeholder for current signals, news, and short headline scans.
nodes.detail: Use this for lightweight observations before they become a deeper brief.

nodes.name: Calls
nodes.summary: Placeholder for video-call notes and decisions.
nodes.detail: Designed to become the landing area for call-derived summaries.

nodes.name: Assets
nodes.summary: Entry point to shared Drive materials.
nodes.detail: Keeps files outside GitHub while the portal stays lightweight.

nodes.name: TinyFish Founder Demo
nodes.summary: Founder-audience demo narrative with evidence cadence and enterprise payoff.
nodes.detail: Copied into this GitHub Pages bundle so Jim does not need seedbox access.

nodes.name: TinyFish Evidence Carousel
nodes.summary: Carousel-style evidence ladder with screenshot receipt flow.
nodes.detail: Copied into this GitHub Pages bundle so Jim does not need seedbox access.

nodes.name: First Call Summary
nodes.summary: Blank slot for the first video-call summary.
nodes.detail: Promote when actual call notes or transcripts exist.

nodes.name: The Corporate
nodes.summary: Modern Machiavelli frame for organizations as human courts with technology, process, KPIs, and strategy decks layered on top.
nodes.detail: An update of The Prince for corporate life: dysfunction comes from people seeking safety, status, belonging, advantage, and moral cover. Technology is the tool and mirror, not the root cause.

nodes.name: Next Summary Slot
nodes.summary: Add the first real post-launch summary under the right nav pill.
nodes.detail: Update portal-universe.json, rebuild artifacts, push Neo4j, and publish GitHub Pages.

edges.note: The frame depends on naming, rhetoric, and the language of power.
AI is treated as mirror and tool inside human systems, not the protagonist.
Call assets can live in Drive.
